required_tools.reason: All projects require GitHub integration for PR creation, file commits, and repository management. Task 4 (Design Snapshot PR Surfacing) and Task 8 (E2E test) both require authenticated GitHub API access for the 5dlabs/sigma-1 repo.

Infrastructure provisioning, resource validation, and production hardening are all performed via Kubernetes manifests and Helm. Task 1 (Provision Dev Infrastructure), Task 9 (Production Hardening), and Task 10 (RBAC, Secret Rotation, Audit Logging) all require direct Kubernetes API access.

Linear API integration is required for agent delegation, issue creation, and validation. Task 2 (Agent Delegation), Task 6 (Validation), and Task 8 (E2E test) all require authenticated Linear API access.

recommended_tools.reason: Task 7 (Web Frontend for Delegation Status Dashboard) uses shadcn/ui for React component scaffolding. While not strictly required for the backend pipeline, it is helpful for frontend code generation and UI consistency.
